auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your account to continue

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

meta.title: Enterprise Platform
meta.description: A production-ready enterprise boilerplate built with Nuxt 4

hero.title: Build Enterprise Apps
hero.description: A production-ready Nuxt 4 boilerplate with authentication, multi-tenancy, i18n, and everything you need.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.description: Built with best practices for enterprise applications

security.title: Security First
security.description: JWT authentication, RBAC, security headers, and CSRF protection built in.

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.description: Full i18n support with lazy-loaded translations and language switcher.

multiTenant.title: Multi-Tenant
multiTenant.description: Subdomain-based multi-tenancy with per-tenant configuration and branding.

dashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
dashboard.description: Full-featured dashboard with sidebar, data tables, charts, and statistics.

pwa.title: PWA Ready
pwa.description: Progressive Web App with offline support, install prompt, and service worker.

modular.title: Modular Architecture
modular.description: Clean, modular codebase with composables, stores, and reusable components.

dashboard.subtitle: Here's what's happening with your platform today.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences
settings.name: Full Name
settings.darkModeDesc: Switch between light and dark theme
settings.aiEnabledDesc: Show the AI panel and assistant features in the dashboard
settings.aiBaseUrlDesc: OpenAI-compatible endpoint (e.g. https://api.openai.com/v1). Never enter API keys here — use NUXT_PUBLIC_AI_BASE_URL.
settings.aiModelDesc: Model ID to use (e.g. gpt-4o, claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022)
settings.aiStreamingDesc: Stream tokens as they arrive instead of waiting for the full response
settings.aiSystemPromptDesc: Optional custom system prompt. Leave blank to use the default.

meta.title: About
meta.description: Learn about our enterprise platform and our mission.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Building the future of enterprise software, one module at a time.
about.missionText: We are committed to building high-quality, scalable, and secure enterprise software. Our platform is designed for teams who need reliability, extensibility, and a great developer experience.

security.title: Security First
security.description: Every feature is built with security as a core principle, not an afterthought.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: We believe in transparent, community-driven development and open standards.

performance.title: Performance
performance.description: Optimized for speed with SSR, prerendering, and edge deployment support.

meta.title: Contact
meta.description: Get in touch with our team.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Have a question or want to learn more? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us more about your project...
contact.successMessage: Thank you! Your message has been sent. We'll get back to you shortly.

ai.emptySubtitle: Ask anything or pick a prompt to get started.
ai.inputPlaceholder: Message the assistant… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
ai.inputHint: AI may make mistakes. Verify important information.
ai.commandTogglePanelDesc: Open or close the assistant panel
ai.notConfiguredWarning: AI gateway URL is not configured.
